sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112949" key="xalazia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλαζ-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n112949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer from</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χάλαζαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:latinLit:phi0978.phi001:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.83</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
